hero.title: Thinking through the living of it.
hero.subtitle: A personal journal on psychology, philosophy, and the questions that don't resolve.
home.heroMicro: Updated when there is something worth saying.
home.authorIntro: I work with data and design by day, and think about meaning, structure, and the interior life by inclination. This site is where those two currents meet.
writing.title: Writing
writing.description: Thoughts on technology, design, and the things worth thinking about.
themes.title: Threads
themes.description: Topics and threads explored across the writing.
about.bio1: I work at the intersection of data, design, and clear thinking — helping organisations turn complex information into meaningful insight. My day-to-day involves dashboards, business reporting, and the analytical craft of making numbers tell honest stories.
about.bio2: Outside of analytics, I'm drawn to questions about how we make sense of the world: the patterns in our thinking, the symbols we carry without knowing, and the structures beneath everyday decisions.
about.whatIWriteBody: This site is where I explore the things I find worth thinking about. The writing spans technology, design, psychology, and the craft of working with information. If a thread connects them, it's an interest in how things work beneath the surface — in systems, in people, in ideas.
about.quote: The goal is not to be interesting, but to be interested — and to write clearly enough that the interest becomes contagious.
